   294	def moe_sum_reduce_torch_compile(x, out, routed_scaling_factor):

   299	@torch.compile
   300	def _swiglu_silu_clamp_mul(x, gemm1_limit):
   301	    gate, up = x.chunk(2, dim=-1)
   302	    gate = F.silu(gate)
   303	    gate = gate.clamp(min=None, max=gemm1_limit)
   304	    up = up.clamp(min=-gemm1_limit, max=gemm1_limit)
   305	    return gate * up

   308	@torch.compile
   309	def _swiglu_gpt_oss_sigmoid_alpha(x, gemm1_alpha, gemm1_limit):
   310	    # NOTE: This variant uses gemm1_alpha, unlike _swiglu_silu_clamp_mul.
   311	    # At present, only GPT-OSS uses this variant.
   312	    gate, up = x[..., ::2], x[..., 1::2]
   313	    gate = gate.clamp(min=None, max=gemm1_limit)
   314	    up = up.clamp(min=-gemm1_limit, max=gemm1_limit)
   315	    return gate * torch.sigmoid(gate * gemm1_alpha) * (up + 1)
